authorization_framing: Phase 6I-52 amendment-1 + amendment-2 documented that stackbuilder.py has NO --write flag and does NOT use PRJCT9_AUTOMATION_WRITE_AUTH. The only authorization gate is the operator's separate decision to actually run the command. Phase 6I-53 WAS authorized by the operator to run the supervised pilot batch IF preflight passed. Preflight did not pass for any ticker (see below); no StackBuilder command was executed.

stackbuilder_execution_log.reason_no_commands_executed: Zero tickers passed preflight. Every ticker in the Phase 6I-52 pilot universe would have triggered the stackbuilder _fetch_secondary_from_yf yfinance fallback because price_cache/daily/ does not exist on disk. Per the Phase 6I-53 operator instructions ("If zero tickers pass preflight, stop with evidence-only PR. Do not run StackBuilder."), no StackBuilder command was invoked.

next_step_recommendation: Rebuild local secondary price cache at price_cache/daily/ before a future Phase 6I-54 supervised batch can run. Without it, every StackBuilder candidate command in the Phase 6I-52 manifest will trigger a live yfinance fetch -- which this phase deliberately prevented. The cache-rebuild path is OUT OF SCOPE for Phase 6I-53; it should be its own explicitly-authorized phase, probably parallel to or downstream of the existing Phase 6E-5 signal_engine_cache_refresher writer.
remaining_limitations: Phase 6I-53 produced no StackBuilder runs because the local secondary-price cache (price_cache/daily/) is missing. This is the safest possible outcome of the preflight gate: it stopped what would have been 25 silent yfinance fetches.

The preflight module reads ONLY Path.exists()/Path.is_file() on the five candidate paths per ticker; it does NOT load any parquet/csv content. A future enhancement could also probe cache_date_range_end / row-count freshness, but Phase 6I-53 deliberately keeps the preflight surface narrow.

The Phase 6I-50 + Phase 6I-51 reclassification verdicts are unchanged from the pre-Phase-6I-53 state -- SPY is still board_render_now, _GSPC is still blocked_or_manual_review. This is expected: no production output was written, so the classification surfaces have nothing new to classify.
